headline: Does AMD's UALink Bet Reveal a Deeper Shift in Its AI Data Center Strategy (AMD)?
summary: The Ultra Accelerator Link Consortium recently ratified new UALink specifications, covering in‑network compute, chiplet integration, manageability, and 200G physical layers, aimed at improving efficiency, interoperability, and scalability for next‑generation AI accelerator deployments. By standardizing an open, multi‑vendor interconnect that is compatible with chiplet ecosystems, UALink strengthens the infrastructure foundation AMD and its peers can use to compete without being tied to...

content.summary: The Ultra Accelerator Link Consortium recently ratified new UALink specifications, covering in‑network compute, chiplet integration, manageability, and 200G physical layers, aimed at improving efficiency, interoperability, and scalability for next‑generation AI accelerator deployments. headline: AMD Deepens AI Push With France Deal And Wayve Auto Bet
summary: AMD (NasdaqGS:AMD) announced a multi year collaboration with the French government to support France’s national AI strategy, focused on sovereign and data center level AI infrastructure. The company also committed a US$60 million investment in UK self driving startup Wayve, alongside Arm and Qualcomm, targeting next generation automotive AI systems. For readers tracking AMD’s shift toward AI centric revenue streams, these moves expand the story beyond core CPUs and GPUs. The France...

headline: AMD Stock Bulldozes Through a 12-Day Winning Streak as U.S.-Iran Ceasefire Fires Up Risk-On Chip Rally
summary: The semiconductor world is witnessing a historic surge as one of its biggest names breaks records from decades ago. On Thursday, Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) extended its winning streak to 12 consecutive days, a feat the company has not achieved in over 20 years. Investors are flocking to the stock as the combination of new technology and a cooling global conflict creates an ideal combination for growth. headline: Intel stock soars to 26-year high, NiSource inks energy deal with Alphabet
summary: Market Catalysts Host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Breaking News Reporter Jake Conley track several of the day's top trending stock tickers, including chip stocks Intel (INTC) and Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) both rallying over 10% this week, Alcoa (AA) citing supply chain issues in its latest earnings miss, and NiSource (NI) inking a long-term deal to power an AI data center with an Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL) subsidiary.

content.title: Intel stock soars to 26-year high, NiSource inks energy deal with Alphabet
content.description: Market Catalysts Host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Breaking News Reporter Jake Conley track several of the day's top trending stock tickers, including chip stocks Intel (INTC) and Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) both rallying over 10% this week, Alcoa (AA) citing supply chain issues in its latest earnings miss, and NiSource (NI) inking a long-term deal to power an AI data center with an Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL) subsidiary.
content.summary: Market Catalysts Host Julie Hyman and Yahoo Finance Breaking News Reporter Jake Conley track several of the day's top trending stock tickers, including chip stocks Intel (INTC) and Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) both rallying over 10% this week, Alcoa (AA) citing supply chain issues in its latest earnings miss, and NiSource (NI) inking a long-term deal to power an AI data center with an Alphabet (GOOG, GOOGL) subsidiary.
